SHADE SOLUTIONS FOR OUTDOOR HOSPITALITY & LIVING

Follow us on Instagram @canopyworx

TRUSTED BY AUSTIN

CanopyWorx is a spin-off of Bartlett Sails & Canvas, the Lake Travis marine and outdoor canvas authority since 1982. Our shade solutions are built on 40+ years of craftsmanship and trusted by top hospitality and community spaces across Austin.

Our Projects

THE S.H.A.D.E.™ PROCESS BY CANOPYWORX

SURVEY

We meet to discuss the physical site conditions, layout, and usage patterns to define opportunities and constraints.

HEAT MAP

We analyze solar exposure, usage times, and functional zones to guide optimal shade placement.

ARCHITECT

We design and engineer each structure for performance, aesthetics, and alignment with your space’s purpose.

DELIVER

Our team fabricates and installs with precision and speed.

ENSURE

We follow through with final checks, long-term durability, and responsive service support.

LET'S TALK SHADE!

Whether you’re ready to start your project or just exploring ideas, we’d love to hear from you.


Fill out the form and let us know your preferred contact method.


We'll be in touch within a sunrise!
